channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Minnesota U.S. Attorney Andy Luger to step down ahead of Trump transition
item.description: U.S. Attorney Andy Luger is stepping down soon as the top federal law enforcement official in Minnesota. As is custom for political appointees, he’s resigning to make way for a yet-to-be-announced successor chosen by incoming President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Matt Sepic, MPR News

item.title: Here's what Kash Patel's former colleagues are saying about him
item.description: Kash Patel has an extensive national security and intelligence background, and officials say when looking at his résumé "objectively," he is "one of the most experienced people ever to be nominated" to lead the FBI.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: France's Macron vows to stay in office till end of term, says he'll name a new prime minister soon
item.description: PARIS (AP) — French President Emmanuel Macron vowed Thursday to stay in office until the end of his term, due in 2027, and announced that he will name a new prime minister within days in efforts to overcome the political deadlock following the resignation of ousted Prime Minister Michel Barnier.
item.dc:creator: TOM NOUVIAN, SYLVIE CORBET and JOHN LEICESTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump names Caleb Vitello as acting director of ICE
item.description: Caleb Vitello's nomination comes as Trump's most controversial pick, Fox News's Pete Hegseth, faces an uphill battle while seeking Senate confirmation.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Polus, NewsNation

item.title: Trump nominates Brandon Judd as ambassador to Chile
item.description: Brandon Judd was the president of the National Border Patrol Council, which represents around 18,000 Border Patrol agents and support personnel. He officially retired from the post on May 18.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Michigan Democrats move to protect reproductive health data before GOP takes control of House
item.description: Democrats in Michigan are pressing to pass reproductive health care legislation before the party loses its majority with the new legislative session next year.
item.dc:creator: Isabella Volmert, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump nominates former border chief Rodney Scott as commissioner of CBP
item.description: President-elect Trump nominated former border chief Rodney Scott as the commissioner of U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy bring Trump's DOGE to Capitol Hill
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Billionaire Elon Musk and fellow entrepreneur Vivek Ramaswamy spent several hours Thursday swapping ideas with lawmakers about President-elect Donald Trump'sDOGE initiative to dismantle parts of the federal government.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO and KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House rejects Democratic efforts to force release of Matt Gaetz ethics report
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The House shut down Democrats' efforts Thursday to release the long-awaited ethics report into former Rep. Matt Gaetz, pushing the fate of any resolution to the yearslong investigation of sexual misconduct allegations into further uncertainty.
item.dc:creator: FARNOUSH AMIRI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pete Hegseth says he will be 'standing right here in this fight' after meeting with senators
item.description: Pete Hegseth met with more senators on Thursday in an effort to shore up his defense secretary nomination ahead of confirmation hearings.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: House torpedoes Democratic-led effort to release Ethics report on Matt Gaetz
item.description: House Republicans on Thursday torpedoed a Democratic-led effort to release the Ethics Committee’s report on former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.), sending the resolution back to the panel.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Imprisoned Proud Boys leader balks at answering a prosecutor's questions about Capitol attack
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — An imprisoned far-right extremist group leader who was the top target of the federal investigation of the Jan. 6, 2021, riot at the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: An architect of Project 2025 is pressuring Republican senators to confirm Pete Hegseth
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — The think tank behind Project 2025, the conservative blueprint linked to President-elect Donald Trump, is launching an effort to back Trump's imperiled selection for secretary of defense in its latest attempt to wield influence in the incoming Republican administration.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Louisiana Treasurer John Fleming announces bid to run for U.S. Sen. Bill Cassidy's seat
item.description: BATON ROUGE, La. (AP) — Louisiana Treasurer John Fleming, a Republican and appointee of Donald Trump's during his first term as president, has announced that he will run for U.S. Senate in the hopes of unseating current member Bill Cassidy, also a Republican, who is up for reelection in 2026.
item.dc:creator: SARA CLINE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: You've been elected to Congress. Now what? Freshman Republican reveals what it's like to enter office
item.description: Rep.-elect Ryan Mackenzie, R-Penn., says Republicans are poised to hit the ground running in the next Congress, unlike President-elect Trump's first term.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Selling Americans a 'lie': How election integrity attorneys battled left-wing efforts to upend voting laws
item.description: President of Restoring Integrity & Trust in Elections Derek Lyons spoke with Fox News Digital regarding the top legal voting battles his group faced ahead of the 2024 election.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: International students confused, anxious about their futures under second Trump term
item.description: International students are holding their breath as President-elect Trump gears up to return to the White House. Multiple schools have put out guidance on when foreign-born students should and shouldn't go abroad to ensure they are in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota House panel votes to absorb legal fees of DFLer in employment dispute
item.description: A DFL state lawmaker will have legal fees covered by the Minnesota House after alleging her rights were violated by an outside employer. Republicans say the move sets a bad precedent.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst, MPR News

item.title: St. Cloud appoints first Somali American to city council
item.description: On a unanimous vote, the city council appointed Hudda Ibrahim to fill a vacancy on the seven-member board. She replaces Jake Anderson, who was elected St. Cloud mayor last month.
item.dc:creator: Kirsti Marohn, MPR News

item.title: Hegseth forced out of vets groups due to drinking, misconduct: New Yorker
item.description: The incidents — relayed in a trail of documents and corroborated to The New Yorker by the accounts of former colleagues — took place prior to Hegseth becoming a full-time Fox News TV host in 2017.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, Fox 5

item.title: Some Democrats are frustrated over Joe Biden reversing course and pardoning his son Hunter
item.description: Already reeling from their November defeat at the polls, Democrats now are grappling with President Joe Biden's pardoning of his son for a federal felony conviction — after the party spent years slamming Donald Trump as a threat to democracy who operates above the law.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: GOP's small majority adds to challenge of tax reform
item.description: House Republicans are heading into the new Congress with a lofty set of tax reform goals, an ambitious agenda made more difficult by a razor-thin majority.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, Fox 5

item.title: Canadian Prime Minister Trudeau flies to Florida to meet with Trump after tariffs threat
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau flew to Florida on Friday to have dinner with President-elect Donald Trump at his Mar-a-Lago club after Trump threatened to impose sweeping tariffs on Canadian products.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES and FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: VIDEO: Donald Trump celebrates Thanksgiving alongside Elon Musk, family in Mar-a-Lago
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump celebrated Turkey Day alongside his family, and other notable figures in South Florida this year.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC
